message:
test(providers): add opaque URL fallback tests for all provider URL normalizers

Adds regression tests verifying that cannot_be_a_base URLs (like
data: URIs) correctly fall through to the string-based fallback path
in all five normalize functions: anthropic, openai, openai_responses,
codex_responses, and cohere.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
